children.value: This is the closest in accuracy yet. Worked using hdc (UK) and colour work where the the two colours are worked inside each others stitches, for more uniform tension.

children.value: I’m pleased with this 7-colouring as a concept, but ideally the tension would be more uniform. I think working in back loops only made this worse, especially at points where the colour changes. I plan to reattempt this soon with the colour work method of

children.value: Despite not matching the eventually pattern, my mistakes seem to have cancelled each other out resulting in quite a nice looking torus. At some stage I will remake this using the latest version of the pattern for these parameters, for comparison.
The knot tied onto it is a
